{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111112B914B022B535650F3368"}"},"total":2396},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7276483340646941477","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然是俗套的先婚后爱，但是真的是很治愈的甜文，终于我前几天因为看了本巧克力里包着屎的郁闷心情也被治愈了，看着看着嘴角就不自觉上扬。","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"先婚后爱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%88%E5%A9%9A%E5%90%8E%E7%88%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774321872650F3368%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227276483340646941477%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227183191791821130790%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%88%E5%A9%9A%E5%90%8E%E7%88%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694189324,"group_id":"7183191791821130790","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现在还在学习和探索中","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Ic4wREJ3BA/Brp+D9AFKICsKBChaLxOguPj67wvDcM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/34428c4fa2004c0788224d9bd6e2afb8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878944&x-signature=T2WBTcODxeGsIgnWCHegolyXRhQ%3D","user_id":"1328649282547255","user_name":"海盐珍珠冰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1328649282547255","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7183191791821130790","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁➕萌宝➕豪门总裁➕甜宠
腹黑冷漠总裁顾珩（heng）之X温柔善良豪门世家女苏婉清】
苏婉清穿书了，穿到古早霸总宠妻文，男主宠妻无下限，很遗憾，苏婉清并不是女主，而是坏事干尽，是男主追求女主的康庄大道上一颗巨型无比的绊脚石，结局落到家破人亡
本文最大的两个反派一个是她自己，爱男主爱到变成卑微舔狗，一个是她的商业联姻偏执老公，爱女主爱到疯魔成痴
但是，还好现在事情还没有发展到不可控制的地步
不过，反派不是对女主死心塌地吗？这个对着自己两眼放光亲亲贴贴，跟自己儿子争宠的粘人精是谁?
大概就是，我被爱包围，所以我知道怎么爱别人
注意:原女主不是坏的，她只是软弱，本来就是成长系女主，现在处于包子阶段，都是很美好的女孩子哈","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/75ba584fb8d054c74d28f7d9684c6f64","author":"余宜尔","author_id":"","book_id":"7183191791821130790","book_name":"穿书女配治愈反派计划","book_short_name":"月亮予我","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7183197752103272972","read_count":"29174","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304912"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count 作者超级棒！尤其是里面女性力量的描写也很出色，虽然自己的丈夫都是霸道总裁类型，多金帅气，但是自己也有技能，不是菟茸丝，不是金丝雀，而且骄傲的小太阳，散发着光芒的皎洁的月亮……每个角色都刻画得好细致[哭][哭][哭]虽然很短，但是娓娓道来的感觉一点也不紧凑！","text_exts":[{"e":152,"s":149,"text":"金丝雀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%91%E4%B8%9D%E9%9B%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774321872650F3368%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227385604406341927705%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227183191791821130790%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%91%E4%B8%9D%E9%9B%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719599524,"group_id":"7183191791821130790","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哪个好看看哪个，bg赛高！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1YOUPzHP8aF7A4ABQ8sAbycIEFXsDEBpwTpocMoIFT7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ccdde66cd07643db962b854efd019537~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881671&x-signature=epbmchsTUNGyuRIGW7kzQzYAGAg%3D","user_id":"1568379344288360","user_name":"日记好难写"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1568379344288360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7183191791821130790","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁➕萌宝➕豪门总裁➕甜宠

女主两辈子都受尽家人宠爱，所以她懂得如何去爱一个人。而男主自小就被爹娘丢一边野蛮生长，他缺爱也不懂如何去爱，但是他愿意全身心地爱女主。两个人都挺直球的，爱一个人是要让对方感受到的，而不是自以为是地用“为你好”来强迫对方接受，尊重对方是爱人的基本。
期待一下副cp吧，感觉作者对人设的拿捏还是挺恰当细腻的，不会很生硬，也不会很粗糙。当然啦，最期待的还是男女主，因为他们一家三口真的好甜啊。[害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694179933,"group_id":"7183191791821130790","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzN7YhZxzl+kSEVsRQKFCIU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/71e4b86b0aa04d07a9eca184749339fa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881706&x-signature=pTssYwufDNdd3tCDFI4xF1YB30k%3D","user_id":"61753757725","user_name":"Bluelinl"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"61753757725","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7183191791821130790","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁➕萌宝➕豪门总裁➕甜宠
